title: Web Application Assessments
summary: Manual testing and targeted automation for auth flows, access control, business logic, and chained exploitation paths.
bullets: API abuse, logic flaws, and input handling

title: Infrastructure and Internal Testing
summary: Network and host reviews that prioritize lateral movement opportunities, privilege escalation, and weak operational controls.
bullets: External and internal attack surface validation
Active Directory and identity path reviews

title: Red Team Operations
summary: Objective-driven engagements built to test detection quality, operational visibility, and response discipline under pressure.
bullets: Debriefs focused on security posture improvement

title: Security Tooling and Automation
summary: Practical tooling for recon, exploitation/post-exploitation, privilege escalation, evasion, reporting, triage, and repeatable validation without losing analyst control.
bullets: Dashboards for findings and attack paths
